visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with a pink beret and a light-colored, puff-sleeved dress. She is hunched over a white paper bowl on a marble-patterned countertop, vigorously stirring a creamy pasta dish with pink-and-white chopsticks. The lighting is bright and indoor-focused, highlighting the steam and the thick texture of the noodles. A large, static Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The scene shifts to a warehouse setting with tall industrial shelves stacked with cardboard boxes. The woman, now wearing a tan bucket hat, holds up a large pink box of 'Mantecare Toowoomba Pasta'. She smiles and points at the box while gesturing with her free hand. Bright overhead warehouse lighting illuminates the scene. (3) The camera zooms in on the price tag on the shelf, followed by a top-down view of the box being opened to reveal eight individual bowls of pasta inside. The woman's hands are visible as she arranges the bowls. (4) Returning to the indoor kitchen setting, the camera captures a close-up of the bowl as the woman continues to stir. Various variety-show style text overlays and colorful graphic stickers appear around the bowl. (5) In the final phase, two women sit side-by-side at a table in a brightly lit room with shelves and toys in the background. The woman on the left holds the bowl and uses chopsticks to eat a long strand of noodle, while the woman in the pink beret on the right watches with an expectant expression, eventually gesturing with her hands to emphasize a point.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 是什麼泡面. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 竟然要自己攪拌100次. [Variety]: 攪拌100次. (3) [Subtitle]: 嘿就是這個. [Variety]: 真香系列. (4) [Subtitle]: 白醬微辣義大利麵. (5) [Subtitle]: 他只要微波3分鐘就可以吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以我也會用. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後它是碗裝的. (8) [Subtitle]: 就不需要你了. (9) [Subtitle]: 靠我自己. (10) [Subtitle]: 那你自己加油吧. (11) [Subtitle]: 我自己把它加熱微波. (12) [Subtitle]: 那你只有8次的機會. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為它裡面只有8碗哦. (14) [Subtitle]: 哦. (15) [Subtitle]: 489元8碗. (16) [Subtitle]: 每碗61塊. [Variety]: 每碗61塊. (17) [Subtitle]: 有點貴哦. (18) [Subtitle]: 不便宜. (19) [Subtitle]: 來試試看好不好吃. (20) [Subtitle]: 61塊只有半碗!!. [Variety]: 61塊只有半碗!!. (21) [Subtitle]: 哎真的挺貴. (22) [Subtitle]: 適合買這個給小朋友. (23) [Subtitle]: 你知道為什麼嗎?. (24) [Subtitle]: 因為它要攪很久. [Variety]: 因為它要攪很久. (25) [Subtitle]: 你要讓它的面. (26) [Subtitle]: 乳化!. [Variety]: 乳化!. (27) [Subtitle]: 是需要力量跟時間的. (28) [Subtitle]: 消耗小孩子的精力. (29) [Subtitle]: 韓國百濟. [Variety]: 韓國百濟 白醬微辣義大利麵. (30) [Subtitle]: 白醬微辣義大利麵. (31) [Subtitle]: 是從來沒有吃過的義大利麵口感. (32) [Subtitle]: 是超商或外面義大利餐廳都沒有的. (33) [Subtitle]: 他的面體口感比較像是. (34) [Subtitle]: 韓式水冷麵那種. (35) [Subtitle]: 非常地Q彈. [Variety]: 非常地Q彈. (36) [Subtitle]: 就是真的超級無敵Q. (37) [Subtitle]: 然後每一根都裹滿了他的白醬. (38) [Subtitle]: 他的白醬非常濃郁又微微的辣. (39) [Subtitle]: 非常地.. 嗯!. (40) [Subtitle]: 非常的清晰值得試試看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in beret, 1 female friend appearing at the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair, initially wearing a pink beret and a beige puff-sleeved dress, later seen with a tan bucket hat in the warehouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Transitions between a modern indoor kitchen with a marble countertop and a vast Costco warehouse filled with high industrial shelving. The final indoor scene includes a blurred living room background with stuffed toys and domestic storage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice asking about the type of instant noodles. An upbeat acoustic-pop background music track with piano and a steady percussive beat starts immediately. There is a distinct, rhythmic clinking sound of chopsticks against a bowl. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the speaker mentions stirring 100 times. The vocal delivery becomes more animated and rapid. (3) As the location shifts, a short digital 'ding' sound effect is heard. The speaker provides details about the Costco product and its pricing with high vocal energy and clear articulation. (4) The audio continues with a comedic tone as the speaker explains the benefits for children, accompanied by playful 'pop' sound effects. The BGM remains consistent in the background, maintaining a cheerful atmosphere. (5) A second female voice joins in, speaking with a relaxed yet appreciative tone, describing the food's texture. Audible reactions such as 'Mmm' and soft laughter are heard over the continuing music and the occasional rustle of packaging. The track concludes with a bright final sentence from the primary speaker.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Origin -> Price/Value Analysis -> Process Demo -> Review/Comparison
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an energetic review of a Korean instant pasta product purchased at Costco. It aims to inform viewers about the product's unique preparation (intensive stirring for emulsification), its cost-effectiveness, and its superior chewy texture compared to standard convenience store options.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a fast-paced social media format with high information density, using dynamic text overlays and a mix of warehouse and home footage to build authenticity.
